tagline: Charcoal-grilled shawarma on Glenoaks Blvd, Glendale.

hero.eyebrow: GLENDALE · W GLENOAKS BLVD · SHAWARMA · 184 REVIEWS
hero.heading: Spit-grilled shawarma.
hero.subheading: A charcoal-grilled shawarma shop on West Glenoaks Boulevard in Glendale. House-marinated chicken and beef stacked on a vertical spit, fresh pita pressed to order, the kind of garlic sauce that makes the wrap.

about.label: the shop
about.heading: House spice, fresh pita, real fire.
paragraphs: Glendale Shawarma sits on West Glenoaks Boulevard in central Glendale. We've been here long enough to know what regulars want and short enough to still care about every plate we send out.

Two vertical spits — chicken and beef — start fresh every morning. Pita gets pressed and grilled per order. Garlic sauce and tahini are made in-house, never pre-bottled. The salads are cut and dressed when you walk in.
Open seven days. Dine in, takeout, or call ahead. The 184 reviews come from regulars who walk in three times a week.

services.title: Chicken Shawarma Wrap
services.description: House-marinated chicken from the spit, fresh pita, garlic sauce, pickles, tomato, parsley. The wrap regulars come for.

services.title: Beef Shawarma Plate
services.description: Sliced beef from the spit, rice, hummus, fattoush salad, pita. Heartier portion for a real lunch.

services.title: Mixed Plate
services.description: Half chicken, half beef, rice, hummus, salad, garlic sauce, tahini, pita. Two proteins, one bill.

services.title: Falafel Wrap
services.description: Hand-formed falafel from the chickpea grind, fresh pita, tahini, salad, pickled turnip. Fully vegetarian.

services.title: Mezze Platter
services.description: Hummus, baba ghanoush, labneh, tabbouleh, falafel, pita. Serves two as a starter or one as lunch.

services.title: Family Pack
services.description: Four wraps, hummus, fries, salad, sauces. Feeds four. Call thirty minutes ahead.

reviews.name: Hovo K.
reviews.text: Glendale Shawarma is the only shawarma I trust on Glenoaks. The chicken is marinated right, the pita is fresh, and the garlic sauce is real. I've eaten here every Friday for two years and the bowl has never been off.

reviews.name: Sara D.
reviews.text: Stopped in cold on a Tuesday and was eating one of the best chicken shawarma wraps I've had in LA eight minutes later. The pita was warm, the garlic sauce was strong, the pickle was the right amount.

reviews.name: Vahe M.
reviews.text: Bring the family here every other Sunday for the family pack — four wraps, hummus, fries, forty-two bucks, ten minutes. Kids ask for it by name. The mezze platter is real money for the size.

contact.address: 1910 W Glenoaks Blvd Suite A, Glendale, CA 91201
contact.mapEmbedQuery: Glendale Shawarma, 1910 W Glenoaks Blvd, Glendale, CA 91201
